Bash("D:/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/bin/mysql" -u root -p123456 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS railway_system DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;" 2>&1)

Bash("D:/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p123456 railway_system -e "SELECT station_code, station_name, city_name FROM stations WHERE station_name LIKE '%高铁%' OR station_name LIKE '%东站%' OR station_name LIKE '%西站%' LIMIT 20;")

Bash("D:/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p123456 railway_system -e "SELECT station_code, station_name, city_name, is_high_speed FROM stations WHERE is_high_speed = 1 ORDER BY station_name LIMIT 20;")

Bash("D:/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p123456 railway_system -e "SELECT station_code, station_name FROM stations WHERE station_code IN \('BJP', 'VNP', 'BXP', 'IZQ', '长春'\) LIMIT 10;")

Bash("D:/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p123456 railway_system -e "
SELECT '========== 数据统计 ==========' as info;

SELECT '车站总数' as item, COUNT\(*\) as count FROM stations
UNION ALL
SELECT '车次总数', COUNT\(*\) FROM trains
UNION ALL
SELECT '时刻表记录', COUNT\(*\) FROM train_stops;

SELECT '========== 车次类型分布 ==========' as info;
SELECT 
    SUM\(CASE WHEN train_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as '高铁G',
    SUM\(CASE WHEN train_type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as '动车D',
    SUM\(CASE WHEN train_type = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as '城际C'
FROM trains;

SELECT '========== 部分热门线路 ==========' as info;
SELECT train_code, start_station_name, end_station_name, 
       CONCAT\(FLOOR\(total_time/60\),'h',total_time%60,'m'\) as duration
FROM trains 
WHERE train_code LIKE 'G%' 
ORDER BY total_time ASC 
LIMIT 10;
")

Bash("D:/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/mysql-8.0.46-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p123456 railway_system -e "SELECT train_code, start_station_name, end_station_name, start_time, end_time, total_time FROM trains WHERE train_code = 'G1';")
